blended.narrative: Sundance is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 47".
